title: Public error enums missing #[non_exhaustive]
description:
30 public error enums across the codebase lack `#[non_exhaustive]`.

Adding new variants would be a breaking change for downstream crates matching on these enums.

Files containing pub enum ...Error:
- lichen-link/src/frame.rs (FrameError)
- lichen-link/src/link_layer.rs (LinkRxError)
- lichen-oscore/src/lib.rs (OscoreError)
- lichen-oscore/src/edhoc.rs (EdhocError)
- lichen-node/src/stack.rs (TxError, RxError)
- lichen-node/src/secure.rs (SecureError)
- lichen-node/src/port_dispatch.rs (DispatchError)
- lichen-hal/src/lib.rs (RadioError, DisplayError)
- lichen-meshtastic/src/gatt.rs (GattError)
- lichen-schc/src/fragment.rs (FragmentError)
- lichen-schc/src/codec.rs (SchcError)
- lichen-gateway/src/slip.rs (SlipError)
- lichen-gateway/src/aprs_is.rs (AprsError)
- lichen-gateway/src/config.rs (ConfigError)
- lichen-ipv6/src/lib.rs (Ipv6Error)
- lichen-core/src/tx_queue.rs (TxQueueError)
- lichen-coap/src/codec.rs (CoapError)
- lichen-core/src/announce.rs (AnnounceError)
- lichen-core/src/udp.rs (UdpError)
- lichen-core/src/loadng.rs (LoadngError)
- lichen-kiss/src/bridge.rs (BridgeError)
- lichen-kiss/src/framing.rs (KissError)
- lichen-core/src/compact_cot.rs (DecodeError, EncodeError)
- lichen-senml/src/cbor.rs (CborError)
- lichen-core/src/ipv6.rs (Ipv6Error)
- lichen-rpl/src/message.rs (RplError)
- lichen-sim/src/client.rs (SimError)
close_reason: Added #[non_exhaustive] attribute to 30 public error enums across the Rust codebase
